name: Jaathoom's Scarf
description:
This scarf is made of fine silk that's the same shade of blue as a clear, cloudless sky. The short ends are edged with a fine gold fringe that seems to sway even in still weather as though touched by invisible winds. The long edges have exquisite embroidery in threads that vary from a blue identical to the silk to the deep gray of storm clouds during winter. Wearing this scarf grants a +2 item bonus to Performance checks to dance and to Acrobatics checks to .

Activate—Vanish 2 (concentrate)

Frequency once per day

Effect The scarf casts 4th-rank on you.

Activate—Jaathoom's Rebuke 1 (concentrate)

Frequency once per hour

Effect You let the winds around you catch the edges of the jaathoom's scarf, and a jaathoom shuyookh appears with a sudden updraft. The winds force your enemies back, granting you some breathing room in battle. Each enemy in a must succeed at a save or be pushed 10 feet. A creature that critically fails is also knocked after being moved. Creatures with the air trait are immune to all these effects.
